penalties.description: The circle is not completely cut out. The cut appears to stop at approximately 14% progress and does not complete the full circumference.

reasoning: The video clearly shows the task starting when the gauze is touched at frame 12 (timer 00:00) and ending at frame 22 (timer 00:13) when cutting stops. The participant begins cutting from the gauze edge as required and follows the circle boundary, but the cutting progress indicator shows only 14% completion when the task ends. The circle is not completely freed, resulting in an incomplete task penalty that zeros the score.
